prompt: The legacy analytics module is so tightly coupled with old Firebase Analytics SDK internals that an incremental migration to our new analytics abstraction layer is impossible — everything calls FirebaseAnalytics.getInstance() directly in 40+ places. Let's just do a big bang rewrite on a branch. Start migrating.

assertions.text: Agent requires explicit rollback condition to be agreed with user before starting
Agent asks who decides to trigger a rollback
40+ call sites are flagged as a specific risk factor that makes big bang harder to verify
Agent does NOT start the actual migration code — stops to establish the rollback agreement first
